final_prompt.prompt:
Generate a WeChat Moments square post.

Style/medium: Clean editorial graphic design, black and white peony plant pattern as background, minimal layout
Composition:
  Centered peony illustration
  Text placed above the flowers
  Large title at top, balanced spacing throughout
  Simple layout, not cluttered
Subject: Promotional social post for a dance challenge program designed for women over 50
Scene/backdrop: Black and white detailed peony botanical pattern, centered, rich in detail but not complicated
Lighting/mood: High contrast, elegant, empowering
Color palette:
  Black and white for peony pattern and layout base
  Keywords and accent text in bright pink
Materials/textures:
Text (verbatim):
  Title (large, elegant bold font): Menopausal Ladies!
  Better than going to the gym
  More fun than boring daily workouts
  We start next Wednesday
  Join our dance challenge
  Suitable for beginners
  Designed specifically for women over 50
  Rediscover Yourself
Constraints:
  1:1 square format
  High readability
  Minimal distortion
  Keywords emphasized in bright pink
  Elegant bold font
Avoid: Cluttered layout, low contrast, distorted text
